# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

kong_databases = [
  {
    name = "postgres"
    type = "postgresql"
    host = "your-db-host"
    port = 5432
    user = "your-db-user"
    password = "your-db-password"
    database = "your-db-name"
  }
]

admin_listen = 8001
admin_tls = false

data_plan = "free"

service = {
  protocol = "http"
  host = "your-service-host"
  port = your-service-port
}

plugins = [
  {
    id = "access-token-auth"
    enforce = true
  },
  {
    id = "set-custom-header"
    service.request_headers.common["X-Custom-Header"] = "value"
  }
]

listen = [
  {
    id = "my-service"
    host = "0.0.0.0"
    port = your-proxy-port
    protocol = "tcp"
    service = service.id
    rewrite_upstream = true
    tls_terminated = true
  }
]
